calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Jacob Harker, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Paul Nicholas Gryfakis, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Solomon Minnich or Karen Minnish.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 6, 2010.

Exhibit--1--Fixed Term Residential Lease.............................................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--2--Three-Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit.....................................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--3--Summary of PG&E Bills....................................................ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Paul Nicholas Gryfakis, and against defendants Solomon Minnich and Karen Minnich as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $12,300.00.
Holdover Damages - $5,800.00.
Attorney Fees - $9,290.00.
Costs - $498.25.

Total - $27,888.25.

Additionally, plaintiff Paul Nicholas Gryfakis is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1350 Divisadero Street, #305, San Francisco, CA 94115. The lease agreement is forfeited.

Counsel stipulated to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Paul Nicholas Gryfakis is present.
Attorney, Jacob Harker, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Solomon Minnich and Karen Minnich, are present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of AUG-02-2010 remains on calendar.

Notice Of Motion And Otion To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer; Form Interogatories - General
Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF PAUL GRYFAKIS' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. Defendants Karen and Solomon Minnich shall provide further responses to the following form interrogatories: Form Interrogatories Nos. 70.1, 70.11, 70.13, 75.1, 75.2, 76.1, 77.1, 78.1, 78.2, 81.3; Defendant Solomon Minnich shall provide further responses to the following form interrogatories: 1.1, 2.1, 2.5, 2.6, 2.7, 2.8, 2.9, 2.10, 17.1. Defendants shall also provide supplemental verifications. Request for Sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $1,847.50 pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 2030.290(c). Prevailing party to submit a form of order. JUDGE: MONICA F. WILEY. NOT REPORTED.
